svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.6"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="gwyfPVto3OYyjQZAuqhD"> <mxGraphModel dx="872" dy="-627" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" background="none" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml MovieTicketBooking_ActivityDiagram

' ===== STYLE =====
skinparam activityBackgroundColor #E3F2FD
skinparam activityBorderColor #1E88E5
skinparam activityDiamondBackgroundColor #FFF8E1
skinparam activityDiamondBorderColor #FFA000
skinparam arrowColor #333333

title Complete Booking Flow - Activity Diagram

start

:Search Movies;
note right: Filter by city, date,\ngenre, language

:Select Movie;

:View Shows by Theater;

:Select Show;
note right: Choose time & screen

:View Seat Availability;
note right: See seat map with\ncategories & prices

:Select Seats;
note right: Max 10 seats\nper booking

:Enter Coupon Code;
note right: Optional discount

:Submit Booking;

if (All seats available?) then (yes)

 partition \"Transaction (SERIALIZABLE)\" {
 :Lock Selected Seats;
 note right #FFCDD2: **Pessimistic Lock**\nPrevents double-booking

 :Calculate Total Price;
 note right: Base × Category Multiplier\n- Coupon Discount

 :Create Booking;
 note right: Status: PENDING\nSeats: BLOCKED

 :Generate Booking Number;
 }

 :Proceed to Payment;

 if (Payment Successful?) then (yes)
 :Confirm Booking;
 note right: Status: CONFIRMED\nSeats: BOOKED

 :Generate E-Ticket;

 :Send Confirmation;
 note right: Email & SMS

 else (no)
 :Cancel Booking;
 note right: Release seats

 :Show Payment Error;
 endif

else (no)
 :Show Error;
 note right: \"Selected seats\nare no longer available\"
endif

stop

@enduml

",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="6vH42XDeX_oHI80BPV8k-3"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1166" width="859" x="60" y="2000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
